preferred: distinct design directions, not palette swaps
motion that supports scroll, cursor, proof, or demo understanding
A/B/C/D directions as separate compositions: Guided Offer Map, Cat Concierge, Studio Proof, Demo Worlds
Better-like bold agency principles when adapted into original proof-led RadeQ layouts
controlled theme crossing: lightness/freedom/novelty/modern-retro/art/futurism/pixel/calm/calculated-minimal/dopamine/colorful/3d/motion/written craft balanced against SEO and conversion
refinement slices that improve proof artifacts, conversion hierarchy, mobile rhythm, and purposeful motion before adding new visual directions
avoid: effects that hide the actual service offer

using every visual theme at once without a clear buyer purpose
using advisory model output when it ignored the redacted product brief or inspected the wrong workspace
